_note: gem -> { attr, sources }. attr computes the socket colour (str=red, dex=green, int=blue); a gem missing here renders a neutral pip with '?'. Attributes below are a confident curated set — spot-check against the game, a wrong attr = a wrong colour (harmless, editable). SOURCES are intentionally empty: accurate per-class quest/vendor availability is a large dataset that must come from a verified source (a maintained gem-data export or careful curation), not guesswork. The engine already reads sources with this shape and resolves them per class — { "kind": "quest"|"vendor", "act": 1, "quest": "...", "npc": "Nessa", "classes": ["Witch"] } (classes omitted = all) — so filling this in is a pure data task. Until then, gemPlan.source in a profile (authored, or from PoB import) drives the reward/buy hints.
